overall.description: A cinematic third-person game scene showing a cloaked character standing in a dark grassy field at night, facing a massive glowing Erdtree and distant illuminated ruins. The atmosphere is moody and atmospheric with blue-toned moonlight and fog, characteristic of a dark fantasy open-world game.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark fantasy grassland overlooking distant glowing tree landmark

agents.ego_description: standing motionless in tall grass, facing the distant glowing Erdtree and surveying the moonlit landscape

entered.detail: massive luminous golden tree dominating the horizon with thick trunk and branching crown
twisted leafless tree with contorted branches silhouetted against the sky
ancient stone structure with warm orange torchlight glowing from within
dense dark evergreen trees framing the right side of the view
tall pine trees with sparse branches framing the left side
dense tall grass blades swaying slightly in the foreground

segments.scene_description: The character stands in a dark grassy field at night, surrounded by dense vegetation. In the distance, the massive glowing Erdtree rises against a cloudy night sky, while a gnarled dead tree stands in the mid-ground. To the right, warm torchlight emanates from ancient stone ruins, creating a striking contrast with the cool blue moonlight that bathes the landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady gaze across a moody, nocturnal landscape where cool moonlight clashes with distant warmth. It begins with a cloaked character standing amidst dense vegetation in a dark grassy field, framed by the imposing silhouette of a gnarled dead tree. As the camera looks further into the distance, the massive, glowing Erdtree rises prominently against a heavy, cloudy night sky. The scene then shifts focus toward the right, where the deep blue tones of the environment are broken by the warm, flickering torchlight emanating from ancient stone ruins.
